word: H4355 - מָכַךְ - mâkak - maw-kak' - Be brought low

sections.paragraph:
Original: מכך

Transliteration: mâkak

Phonetic: maw-kak'

BDB Definition:

  1. to be low, be humiliated
    1. (Qal) to be low, be humiliated
    2. (Niphal) to sink
    3. (Hophal) to be brought low

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1193

Part(s) of speech: Verb
